summary.default: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in backend development, technical support, and web systems. Currently completing a BSc Honours in Security and Network Engineering. I build reliable systems, debug production issues, and ship clean code. Open to backend, cloud, support, and security-focused roles.
summary.backend: Backend developer with experience building APIs, web systems, and automation tools. Comfortable with Python, C#, Java, Node.js, and SQL databases. I focus on reliability, clean code, and practical solutions that work in production.
summary.support: Technically strong support professional with L2/L3 experience resolving real production issues. Background in backend development gives me the ability to go deeper than surface-level fixes. Fast learner, clear communicator, calm under pressure.
summary.cloud: Cloud-curious backend developer with Azure exposure and a Security and Network Engineering Honours degree in progress. I understand infrastructure, deployment, and system reliability from both a development and operational angle.
summary.security: Security and Network Engineering Honours student with a Computer Science foundation and practical backend experience. Familiar with secure coding practices, network fundamentals, and system administration via PowerShell and Azure.

projects.name: Password Generator
projects.description: Cryptographically secure password generator built entirely in the browser using the Web Cryptography API. Includes strength scoring via entropy calculation, configurable character sets, and a clean UI.

projects.description: A service that maps long URLs to short codes, handles redirects, and tracks basic analytics. Built with a backend API and persistent storage.
